Action Step: I want you to think of one tiny habit. Think of one habit that you
want to build and keep that habit in mind as you progress throughout the
course. Obviously, you'll be able to apply these lessons to many habits in your
life, but it helps to have one topic you can keep returning to when we get to the
action steps in each video.
